main_themes: The Screen-Time Prison: Relinquishing 4.5 months of life per year.
The Engine Fuel: Potential vs. God's Love.
Spiritual Squatting: The spirit of Sloth vs. Christ.

nuggets.idea_one_liner: You are spending 4.5 months of every year staring at a glass rectangle while your parents wonder why you haven't retired them yet.
nuggets.proof_quote: When we divided that by 30, we got 4.55 [months]. ... You've been slacking your life away. You have potential and you're just wasting it.

creator_notes.tone: Brutally honest and math-driven. (V3 Reprocessed Output).
